adjudicator_mark.evidence:
The opening leads with self-praise, not customer impact — style guide rule 3.**
The draft opens with "LarkPay has maintained 99.99% uptime… does not change our commitment to reliability" and later adds "Our engineering culture treats reliability as the first feature of the product." `docs/customer-comms-style-guide.md` rule 3 requires leading with customer impact and remediation. This marketing framing should be cut

disputes.rule: two-of-three majority: the two primary judges' marks plus the adjudicator's mark; because the primaries split one-to-one on a disputed mark, the majority equals the adjudicator's mark, and the mark stays in every denominator
